title: Gabe Pack
description: A texture pack themed after GabetheMC.
body:
**GabeTheMC Pack** is a PVP resource pack that will take your PVP experience to the next level!  

Check out the **Gallery** section for example images of this pack.  

# Features  
- *Changes many textures to make it a gabethemc experience*  

# Changed Items  
<details>  
<summary>Changed Items/Entities/Other</summary>  
- Helmets, chestplates, leggings, and boots (multiple variants)  
- Tools and weapons (axe, bow, trident, staff, and more)  
- Blocks and items such as ingots, crystals, and food  
- Totem and GUI elements  
</details>  

# Installation  
GabeTheMC Pack is compatible with Minecraft **1.21.4**. You can install it through the Modrinth app or manually add it to your resource pack folder.  

# Support / Credits  
This project was fully created by **bug_finder**.  

For feedback or support, reach out via Discord!
